'String', ], ], 'exception' => true, ], 'InvalidRequestException' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'Message' => [ 'shape' => 'String', ], ], 'exception' => true, ], 'JobId' => [ 'type' => '^([\\p{L}\\p{Z}\\p{N}_.:/=+\\-%@]*)$', ], 'JobStatus' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'SUBMITTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED', 'PARTIAL_SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'STOP_REQUESTED', 'STOPPED', ], ],
